'''fadazha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:enantiomericity|enantiomericity]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-d-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:enantiomericity|enantiomericity]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| fadazha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fædæzhæth|fædæzhæth]] || [[word:fædæzhæj|fædæzhæj]] || [[word:fædæzhæsh|fædæzhæsh]] || [[word:fædæzhæ|fædæzhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fadadazhath|fadadazhath]] || [[word:fadadazhaj|fadadazhaj]] || [[word:fadadazhash|fadadazhash]] || [[word:fadadazha|fadadazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fadazhath|fadazhath]] || [[word:fadazhaj|fadazhaj]] || [[word:fadazhash|fadazhash]] || [[word:fadazha|fadazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fadafzhath|fadafzhath]] || [[word:fadafzhaj|fadafzhaj]] || [[word:fadafzhash|fadafzhash]] || [[word:fadafzhaf|fadafzhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fadazhatha|fadazhatha]] || [[word:fadazhaja|fadazhaja]] || [[word:fadazhasha|fadazhasha]] || [[word:fadazhaka|fadazhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fadazhath|fadazhath]] || [[word:fadazhaj|fadazhaj]] || [[word:fadazhash|fadazhash]] || [[word:fadazha|fadazha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fadazhathal|fadazhathal]] || [[word:fadazhajal|fadazhajal]] || [[word:fadazhashal|fadazhashal]] || [[word:fadazhakal|fadazhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fadazhathatha|fadazhathatha]] || [[word:fadazhajaja|fadazhajaja]] || [[word:fadazhashasha|fadazhashasha]] || [[word:fadazhaka|fadazhaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fadazhathan|fadazhathan]] || [[word:fadazhajan|fadazhajan]] || [[word:fadazhashan|fadazhashan]] || [[word:fadazhakan|fadazhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fadazhathaoro|fadazhathaoro]] || [[word:fadazhajaoro|fadazhajaoro]] || [[word:fadazhashaoro|fadazhashaoro]] || [[word:fadazhakaoro|fadazhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|eda3f80}}
